glosses.hi: कॉस्मेटिक्स और व्यक्तिगत देखभाल की दुकान

sentences.target: Ich hole schnell Shampoo aus der Drogerie.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhoːlə ʃnɛl ˈʃampuː aʊs deːɐ dʁoɡeˈʁiː/

translations.de: Ich hole schnell Shampoo aus der Drogerie.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhoːlə ʃnɛl ˈʃampuː aʊs deːɐ dʁoɡeˈʁiː/
translations.en: I'm quickly grabbing shampoo from the drugstore.
translations.es: Voy a pasar rápido por la farmacia a comprar champú.
translations.fr: Je vais vite à la pharmacie acheter du shampoing.
translations.it: Vado al volo in farmacia a prendere lo shampoo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我去药妆店快买瓶洗发水。
translations.yue: 我快啲去藥妝店買支洗頭水。
translations.ru: Я быстро забегу в аптеку за шампунем.
translations.pt: Vou passar rápido na farmácia para comprar xampu.
translations.he: אני קופץ מהר לפארם לקנות שמפו.
translations.tr: Hızlıca kozmetik mağazasından şampuan alıp geliyorum.
translations.vi: Mình chạy ra cửa hàng mỹ phẩm mua nhanh chai dầu gội.
translations.ar: سأمر بسرعة على الصيدلية لأشتري شامبو.
translations.nl: Ik haal snel shampoo bij de drogist.
translations.uk: Я швидко забіжу в аптеку по шампунь.
translations.hi: मैं जल्दी से केमिस्ट से शैम्पू लेकर आ रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Szybko wpadnę do drogerii po szampon.
translations.el: Περνάω γρήγορα από το φαρμακείο να πάρω σαμπουάν.
translations.nb: Jeg stikker raskt innom apoteket for å kjøpe sjampo.
translations.id: Aku cepat ke toko kosmetik buat beli sampo.
translations.sv: Jag springer snabbt in på apoteket och köper schampo.
translations.ro: Trec repede pe la farmacie să iau șampon.
translations.cs: Rychle skočím do drogerie pro šampon.
translations.da: Jeg smutter hurtigt forbi apoteket og køber shampoo.
translations.ja: ドラッグストアでシャンプーをさっと買ってくる。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the finite verb 'hole'.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; governs the direct object 'Shampoo' and PP 'aus der Drogerie'.
Adverb of manner modifying the verb 'hole'.
Common noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'hole'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a source/location PP.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Drogerie'.
Common noun, dative feminine singular; object of the preposition 'aus'.

translations.en: The drugstore is about to close.
translations.es: La farmacia está a punto de cerrar.
translations.pt: A farmácia está prestes a fechar.
translations.vi: Cửa hàng mỹ phẩm sắp đóng cửa.
translations.hi: केमिस्ट की दुकान अभी बंद होने वाली है.
translations.el: Το φαρμακείο είναι έτοιμο να κλείσει.
translations.ro: Farmacia e pe cale să se închidă.
translations.ja: ドラッグストアはもうすぐ閉まる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject noun 'Drogerie'.
Common noun, nominative feminine singular; subject of 'macht ... zu'.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; part of the separable verb 'zumachen' ('to close'), completed by the particle 'zu'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase 'macht ... zu' ('soon/right away').
Separable verbal particle completing 'macht' to form 'zumachen' ('to close').

sentences.target: Wir treffen uns vor der Drogerie.

translations.de: Wir treffen uns vor der Drogerie.
translations.en: We're meeting in front of the drugstore.
translations.fr: On se retrouve devant la pharmacie.
translations.pt: Vamos nos encontrar em frente à farmácia.
translations.vi: Mình hẹn nhau trước cửa hàng mỹ phẩm.
translations.nl: We spreken af voor de drogist.
translations.el: Θα συναντηθούμε έξω από το φαρμακείο.
translations.id: Kita ketemuan di depan toko kosmetik.
translations.ja: ドラッグストアの前で会おう。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject of 'treffen'.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person plural.
Reflexive/reciprocal personal pronoun, accusative 1st person plural; object of 'treffen' ('meet each other').
Preposition governing dative (static location here); introduces a locative PP.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Drogerie'.
Common noun, dative feminine singular; object of the preposition 'vor'.

sentences.target: Er arbeitet seit kurzem in der Drogerie.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ ˈaʁbaɪtət zaɪt ˈkʊʁtsəm ɪn deːɐ dʁoɡeˈʁiː/

translations.de: Er arbeitet seit kurzem in der Drogerie.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ ˈaʁbaɪtət zaɪt ˈkʊʁtsəm ɪn deːɐ dʁoɡeˈʁiː/
translations.en: He recently started working at the drugstore.
translations.es: Hace poco empezó a trabajar en la farmacia.
translations.fr: Il a commencé récemment à travailler à la pharmacie.
translations.it: Ha iniziato da poco a lavorare in farmacia.
translations.zh-Hans: 他最近刚在药妆店上班。
translations.ru: Он недавно устроился работать в аптеке.
translations.pt: Ele começou a trabalhar na farmácia há pouco tempo.
translations.he: הוא התחיל לעבוד בפארם לא מזמן.
translations.tr: Yakın zamanda kozmetik mağazasında çalışmaya başladı.
translations.vi: Anh ấy mới bắt đầu làm ở cửa hàng mỹ phẩm.
translations.nl: Hij is sinds kort bij de drogist gaan werken.
translations.uk: Він нещодавно почав працювати в аптеці.
translations.hu: Nemrég kezdett el a drogériában dolgozni.
translations.hi: उसने हाल ही में केमिस्ट की दुकान में काम शुरू किया है.
translations.pl: On niedawno zaczął pracować v drogerii.
translations.el: Πρόσφατα άρχισε να δουλεύει στο φαρμακείο.
translations.nb: Han begynte nylig å jobbe på apoteket.
translations.id: Dia baru mulai kerja di toko kosmetik.
translations.sv: Han började jobba på apoteket nyligen.
translations.ro: A început de curând să lucreze la farmacie.
translations.da: Han er for nylig begyndt at arbejde på apoteket.
translations.ja: 彼は最近ドラッグストアで働き始めた。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of 'arbeitet'.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular.
Temporal preposition governing dative; introduces duration starting point.
Substantivized adjective in the fixed expression 'seit kurzem', dative singular; denotes a recent time.
Preposition governing dative here (static location); introduces a locative PP.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Drogerie'.
Common noun, dative feminine singular; object of the preposition 'in'.

On se retrouve devant la pharmacie.
Il a commencé récemment à travailler à la pharmacie.
it: Vado al volo in farmacia a prendere lo shampoo.
Ha iniziato da poco a lavorare in farmacia.

A farmácia está prestes a fechar.
Vamos nos encontrar em frente à farmácia.
Ele começou a trabalhar na farmácia há pouco tempo.

Kita ketemuan di depan toko kosmetik.
